caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is positioned centrally against a solid dark background, appearing to deliver a presentation. She is wearing a light green tunic featuring delicate floral embroidery along the neckline and a simple dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her clothing. In the bottom left and right corners of the scene, a small logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible. As the sequence progresses, the woman speaks, her facial expressions shifting as she articulates her points. Her hand gestures evolve from resting at her waist to moving outward and upward, emphasizing her speech. Throughout the clip, she remains in a seated position, maintaining her focus forward toward the viewer while her mouth and hands move dynamically to accompany her presentation.
